The IRGC said they struck U.S. military bases in Jordan, Bahrain and Kuwait in a multi-phase retaliatory operation overnight, setting fuel and ammunition depots ablaze and destroying Patriot air defence system and a radar.

Iran's Foreign Ministry said early Monday that the United States has violated almost every part of the ceasefire agreement, as it strongly condemned a new wave of U.S. strikes on Iranian territory over the past day.
Iran's deputy foreign minister said that no action against the Islamic Republic should go unanswered.

Iranian Foreign Ministry Spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei has said that the pursuit of justice and revenge for the martyred Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei is a serious national demand.

The IRGC Navy has announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz until further notice and until U.S. interventions cease.
The IRGC said its aerospace forces hit US Prince Hassan airbase in Jordan, targeting infrastructure and MQ-9 drone hangars, after the U.S. attacked coastal bases and telecom towers in southern Iran.
The IRGC said they launched a heavy and surprise attack on U.S. aircraft carrier logistical support centres and refuelling platforms at the port of Duqm in Oman on Sunday.
